nasb.text: Besides the continual burnt offering and its grain offering, you shall present them with their drink offerings. They shall be without defect.

esv.text: Besides the regular burnt offering and its grain offering, you shall offer them and their drink offering. See that they are without blemish.

cnv.text: 除了常獻的燔祭和同獻的素祭以外，你們還要獻上這些祭物和同獻的奠祭，都要沒有殘疾的。’”

ccb.text: 除了日常的燔祭和同献的素祭以外，还要献上奠祭。祭牲不可有残疾。
